final_prompt.prompt:

Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a realistic product-shot atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a realistic hard plastic card surface treatment — exact sheen and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "字节跳动" wordmark
Constraints: must preserve both front and back faces of the badge in a single image
Avoid:
